column1: # Phase 4 ZAP baseline rules -- ignore expected MEDIUM findings on staging.
# Reference: OWASP ZAP rule IDs https://www.zaproxy.org/docs/alerts/

column3: Content Security Policy header -- handled by Nginx; verify in security-headers test
Absence of Anti-CSRF Tokens -- JWT Bearer auth (not cookie-based); CSRF not applicable to our API
Permissions Policy header -- Phase 6 polish; not required for MVP launch
Timestamp Disclosure -- server timestamps in API responses are intentional (non-sensitive)
Application Error Disclosure -- test environment may surface stack traces; prod has pino JSON only
